title: omphalodes nitida
intro: Omphalodes nitida, also known as kidney-shaped forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Omphalodes nitida include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Omphalodes nitida can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
